death_strike.name: Death Strike
death_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A necrotic strike that drains life. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Death Pip.

frost_fever.name: Frost Fever
frost_fever.description: Setup: Inflict a freezing disease. Generates 1 Death Pip and [Chills] the target.

oblivion_strike.name: Oblivion Strike
oblivion_strike.description: Payoff: A strike that channels the void. Consumes 5 Death Pips to deal massive Shadow damage.

death_and_decay.name: Death and Decay
death_and_decay.description: Payoff/AOE: Corrupt the ground beneath your feet. Consumes 3 Death Pips to deal AOE Shadow damage over 10 ticks.

bone_shield.name: Bone Shield
bone_shield.description: Defense: Surround yourself with whirling bones. Reduces incoming Physical damage by 50% for 6 ticks.

unbreakable_will.name: Unbreakable Will
unbreakable_will.description: Defense: Break free of all control effects and gain [Unstoppable] for 2 ticks.

death_grip.name: Death Grip
death_grip.description: Mobility/Utility: Pull the target to your location instantly.

army_of_the_dead.name: Army of the Dead
army_of_the_dead.description: Utility/Signature: Summon 5 temporary ghouls to overwhelm the target for 30 ticks.

death_knight_physiology.name: Death Knight Physiology
death_knight_physiology.description: Passive: Lord of Woe. You gain 10% bonus damage for every Debuff on your target and your Death Pip generation increases by 20% when in magical darkness.
